what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment posted in the design-assets channel, pointing to a specific visual asset by an image:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only with no body content
target uses an image:// URI naming 'Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 6 (1)'
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: image:// URI scheme in the target field
notes: This is a lightweight, timestamped attachment ledger entry that maps a channel to a named visual asset.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the content: it is a typed, dated attachment record for an image in a channel.
intention_signals: It appears to track when a particular image asset was attached to a channel so the attachment can be retrieved by reference later.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme to address the target asset rather than a filesystem or HTTP path.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped, typed pointer from a channel to a specific visual asset, enabling attachment lookup and provenance tracking.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record linking the design-assets channel to the image asset 'Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 6 (1)' via an image:// URI with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment in a channel so it can be referenced and retrieved later.
